creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Still no support for the following card found in e.g. HP ProBook 645 G1:

none2@pci0:3:0:0:       class=0x028000 card=0x05e214e4 chip=0x435914e4 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Broadcom Inc. and subsidiaries'
    device     = 'BCM43228 802.11a/b/g/n'
    class      = network

(This is on fresh -CURRENT, using the instructions in base r326454).
